summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tech Analysis blocks functionality. All 6 blocks are working correctly and displaying real backend data from /api/ta-engine/mtf/BTC endpoint.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ta-engine/mtf/BTC returns valid data structure
PatternActivationLayer (Detected Elements) displays 37 elements with patterns, indicators, structure, and levels
DeepAnalysisBlocks renders all 6 blocks: Technical Summary, Primary Setup, Market Structure, Key Drivers, Conflicts/Risks, Setup Breakdown
Technical Summary shows Asset (BTCUSDT), Timeframe (4H/1D), Technical Bias (NEUTRAL), Confidence (20%/27%), Market Regime (uptrend)
Primary Setup displays Setup Type (uptrend/symmetrical triangle), Direction (NEUTRAL), Confluence Score
Market Structure shows HH×2, HL×1, LL×1 structure points and resistance×2, support×1 levels
Key Drivers displays real indicators: RSI, MACD, ADX, PRICE_EMA_POSITION, SMA_STACK, ICHI
Conflicts/Risks block renders correctly (no conflicts detected - which is good)
Setup Breakdown provides textual explanation of the analysis
Element clicking functionality works (11 clickable elements in Detected Elements)
Timeframe switching works correctly (4H ↔ 1D) with data updates
Pattern detection working: Symmetrical Triangle pattern detected with 69% confidence
Real-time data integration: All data comes from backend API, not hardcoded placeholders

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All Tech Analysis blocks rendering and functional
